Fuck… Okay, maybe he can give you what you’re asking for if you beg real pretty again. Just make sure you don’t spill a single fucking drop or he’ll make you clean his sweaty cock for an entire week.

So User's really fucking stupid and pathetic in this one but let’s be real here, she's always like that in my bots lmfao. She's also implied to be petite. Outside of these three factors, nothing else is hard-coded into her. As far as relationship goes, she and Morgan are still strangers. Morgan has two intros; The first one's more comedy and User's literally running after him begging him to let her give him her number while the second intro takes place in a Costco parking lot and she approaches him. Why she approached him is up to you.

For Morgan’s ALT bot where you move in with him, click here~
